title.en: China-to-Namibia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入纳米比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入納米比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Namibia NSI conformity expectations, ECB electricity licensing and net-metering context, NamPower and Regional Electricity Distributor grid-connection gates, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility interface, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence, and Namibia 50 Hz 220/380 V grid context — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与纳米比亚NSI合格评定预期、ECB电力许可及净计量背景、NamPower及区域电力配电商并网门槛、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据及纳米比亚50 Hz 220/380 V电网背景——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與納米比亞NSI合格評定預期、ECB電力許可及淨計量背景、NamPower及區域電力配電商併網門檻、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據及納米比亞50 Hz 220/380 V電網背景——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NSI conformity scope determination, ECB licence decision, NamPower or Regional Electricity Distributor grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current NSI standards adoption, ECB licensing and net-metering rules, NamPower and RED connection requirements, project-owner specifications, and applicable IEC editions with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NSI合格评定范围裁定、ECB许可决定、NamPower或区域电力配电商并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行NSI标准采纳状况、ECB许可及净计量规则、NamPower和RED接入要求、项目业主规格及适用IEC版本。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NSI合格評定範圍裁定、ECB許可決定、NamPower或區域電力配電商併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行NSI標準採納狀況、ECB許可及淨計量規則、NamPower和RED接入要求、項目業主規格及適用IEC版本。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Namibia, the practical gates are: (1) NSI conformity expectations where Namibian standards adopt or reference IEC standards; (2) ECB licensing or regulatory treatment for generation, supply, IPP, and net-metering projects; (3) NamPower or the relevant Regional Electricity Distributor connection approval for grid-tied systems; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (5) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence; and (6) EMC evidence under IEC 61000-series methods and IEC 62920 where required by the project. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines do not automatically satisfy Namibia project acceptance and should be supplemented with IEC evidence and Namibia-specific grid-setting validation for 50 Hz 220/380 V networks.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口纳米比亚时，实际门槛包括：（1）在纳米比亚标准采纳或引用IEC标准时满足NSI合格评定预期；（2）针对发电、供电、IPP及净计量项目确认ECB许可或监管处理；（3）并网系统取得NamPower或相关区域电力配电商接入批准；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（5）IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（6）项目要求下的IEC 61000系列方法及IEC 62920 EMC证据。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准不会自动满足纳米比亚项目验收，应补充IEC证据，并针对纳米比亚50 Hz 220/380 V电网进行并网参数验证。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口納米比亞時，實際門檻包括：（1）在納米比亞標準採納或引用IEC標準時滿足NSI合格評定預期；（2）針對發電、供電、IPP及淨計量項目確認ECB許可或監管處理；（3）併網系統取得NamPower或相關區域電力配電商接入批准；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（5）IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（6）項目要求下的IEC 61000系列方法及IEC 62920 EMC證據。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準不會自動滿足納米比亞項目驗收，應補充IEC證據，並針對納米比亞50 Hz 220/380 V電網進行併網參數驗證。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
